---
title: "Promotion effect of nickel on the stability of NiMnAl catalysts for the PET glycolysis"
date: 2025-10-01
author:
  - name: Nascimento, Hezrom S.
  - name: França, Rharyne H.M.
  - name: Lima, Stevie H.
  - name: Arcanjo, Ana P.
  - name: França, Elvis J.
  - name: Castro, Aline M.
  - name: Dias, Marcos L.
  - name: Landers, Richard
  - name: Barbosa, Celmy M.B.M.
  - name: Frety, Roger
  - name: Pimentel, Maria Fernanda
  - name: Pacheco, Jose G.A.
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Catalysis Today"
  volume: 458
  doi: "10.1016/j.cattod.2025.115376"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Promotion effect of nickel on the stability of NiMnAl catalysts for the PET glycolysis</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
